template.name: ODE_Model

location.label: R0' == boundedRateR0() && R1' == boundedRateR1() && R2' == boundedRateR2() && R3' == boundedRateR3() && R4' == boundedRateR4() && R5' == boundedRateR5() && R6' == boundedRateR6() && R7' == boundedRateR7() && R8' == boundedRateR8() && R9' == boundedRateR9() && R10' == boundedRateR10() && R11' == boundedRateR11() && R12' == boundedRateR12() && R13' == boundedRateR13() && R14' == boundedRateR14() && R15' == boundedRateR15()

transition.label: R0 = R0Init, R1 = R1Init, R2 = R2Init, R3 = R3Init, R4 = R4Init, R5 = R5Init, R6 = R6Init, R7 = R7Init, R8 = R8Init, R9 = R9Init, R10 = R10Init, R11 = R11Init, R12 = R12Init, R13 = R13Init, R14 = R14Init, R15 = R15Init
